assessment.focus_note: Continue to monitor geopolitical tensions and conflicting narratives, particularly regarding Iran and China, and the broader implications for global power realignments. Prioritize verification of claims and analyze how disinformation is used to shape public perception, aligning with the Veritas Lens synthesis. Also, investigate the Irish fuel protests for connections to broader societal tensions and potential manipulation, and track the impact of the @realbababanaras account on these narratives.
